svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="I-iAfvrNneakAddrUdjn"> <mxGraphModel dx="1645" dy="626" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "stateDiagram-v2
 %% Reset Condition
 [*] --> IDLE : rst_n == 0

 %% IDLE State Transitions
 IDLE --> DONE : in_valid & in_ready \n AND (a_in==0 OR b_in==0 OR a_in==b_in) \n [Early Exit]
 IDLE --> RUN : in_valid & in_ready \n AND (a_in!=0 AND b_in!=0 AND a_in!=b_in)
 IDLE --> IDLE : No input handshake \n (Waiting)

 %% RUN State Transitions
 RUN --> RUN : a_next != b_next \n [Iterative Subtraction]
 RUN --> DONE : a_next == b_next \n [Convergence]

 %% DONE State Transitions
 DONE --> IDLE : out_valid & out_ready \n [Output Handshake]
 DONE --> DONE : No output handshake \n (Stalled Consumer)",
 "config": null
}" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="401" width="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="IDLE" mermaidId="n:IDLE" mermaidBaseStyle="rounded=1;absoluteArcSize=1;arcSize=10;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" mermaidBaseValue="IDLE" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-3"> <mxCell parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" style="rounded=1;absoluteArcSize=1;arcSize=10;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="83" width="147" x="30" y="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="DONE" mermaidId="n:DONE" mermaidBaseStyle="rounded=1;absoluteArcSize=1;arcSize=10;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" mermaidBaseValue="DONE" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-4"> <mxCell parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" style="rounded=1;absoluteArcSize=1;arcSize=10;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="51" width="162" x="22.5" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="RUN" mermaidId="n:RUN" mermaidBaseStyle="rounded=1;absoluteArcSize=1;arcSize=10;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=light-dark(#ECECFF,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#9370DB,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=16;" mermaidBaseValue="RUN" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-5"> <mxCell parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" mermaidBaseStyle="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet AND (a_in!=0 AND b_in!=0 AND a_in!=b_in)" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-8"> <mxCell edge="1" parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" source="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-3" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" target="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0054" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="<font style="font-size: 10px;">No input handshake<br>(Waiting)</font>" mermaidId="e:IDLE->IDLE#0" mermaidBaseStyle="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" mermaidBaseValue="No input handshake
(Waiting)" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-9"> <mxCell edge="1" parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" source="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-3" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);rounded=0;" target="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1043" y="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="210" y="96" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="<font style="font-size: 9px;">a_next != b_next<br>[Iterative Subtraction]</font>" mermaidId="e:RUN->RUN#0" mermaidBaseStyle="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" mermaidBaseValue="a_next != b_next

[Convergence]" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-11"> <mxCell edge="1" parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" source="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-5" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" target="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="<font style="font-size: 10px;">out_valid &amp; out_ready<br>[Output Handshake]</font>" mermaidId="e:DONE->IDLE#0" mermaidBaseStyle="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);exitX=0.29032258064516125;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;curved=1;exitX=0.29;exitY=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;" mermaidBaseValue="out_valid & out_ready

(Stalled Consumer)" id="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-13"> <mxCell edge="1" parent="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-1" source="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-4" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);rounded=0;" target="1Vpnx0BeWim2av4n_5tr-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1495" y="56" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="<font style="font-size: 10px;">Reset</font>" mermaidId="e:DONE->IDLE#0" mermaidBaseStyle="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;endSize=9;fillColor=none;strokeColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);html=1;fontSize=16;labelBackgroundColor=#E8E8E88D;fontFamily=Trebuchet MS,Verdana,Arial,sans-serif;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);exitX=0.29032258064516125;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;curved=1;exitX=0.29;exitY=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;" mermaidBaseValue="out_valid & out_ready
